title: Incident date outside reporting or coverage window
hint: Challenge exact start/end dates and grace periods.

title: Re-entered claim creates inconsistent state
hint: Attack reopening, duplicate submission, and partial-save recovery.

title: Sensitive data shown or handled without appropriate review
hint: Challenge medical, disability, or identity data exposure in summaries and confirmations.

title: Loss amount rounding changes payout logic
hint: Look for threshold-sensitive decimals and locale-specific formatting.

title: Claim references a policy that belongs to another customer
hint: Challenge policy-number and claimant identity linkage.

title: Document review or declaration step bypass
hint: Try to proceed without mandatory declarations or attachments being validated.

title: Incident facts conflict across related fields
hint: Challenge impossible combinations that should force clarification.
testDataHints: future incident date with closed claim

title: Required follow-up contact path is incomplete
hint: Check that escalation-critical contact details cannot be omitted when the scenario requires them.

title: Coverage limit threshold not enforced consistently
hint: Challenge exact boundary around deductible or payout limits.

title: Replayed claim reference accepted as fresh submission
hint: Challenge duplicate or stale references across retries.
